titleMn: Өдөр 2: Тоо ба Өдөр тутмын үйл явдал
objectiveEn: About one hour. Learn 20 number and routine words, Present Simple grammar for I/You/We/They, listening, speaking, and homework.
objectiveMn: Ойролцоогоор 1 цаг. 20 шинэ үг, I/You/We/They-тай Present Simple дүрэм, сонсох, ярих, гэрийн даалгавар.
contentEn: Learn numbers 1-10 and daily routine verbs while practicing the Present Simple tense for I, You, We, They.
contentMn: 1-ээс 10 хүртэлх тоо болон өдөр тутмын үйлдлийн үгсийг сурч, I/You/We/They-тай Present Simple цагийг дадлагажуулна.

vocabulary.example: I wake up in the morning.
I eat lunch in the afternoon.
I drink water in the morning.
I go to school every day.

quiz.question: Choose the correct sentence:
quiz.explanation: With I/You/We/They use the base verb (no -s).

quiz.question: What time does Bat wake up in the listening?
quiz.explanation: Bat says 'I wake up at six thirty.'

quiz.question: Make this negative: 'They sleep early.'
quiz.explanation: For They, use don't + base verb.

quiz.question: Which is a question form?
quiz.explanation: Move 'do' to the front for yes/no questions.

quiz.question: What does Bat eat for breakfast?
quiz.explanation: He says 'I drink tea and eat bread.'

quiz.question: What time does Bat sleep?
quiz.explanation: He says 'I sleep at ten o'clock.'

quiz.question: Choose the correct word: 'I _____ water every morning.'
quiz.explanation: I + base verb in Present Simple.

quiz.question: Which is a signal word for Present Simple?
quiz.explanation: Present Simple uses every day, always, usually, never.

quiz.question: How do you say 'босох' in English?
What do Bat and Sarnai say at the end of the dialogue?

page1.grammarTopic: Present Simple — I / You / We / They
page1.grammarExplanation: The Present Simple tense describes things we do regularly, habits, and daily routines. For I / You / We / They — just use the BASE VERB with NO changes. Add 'do not' (don't) for negatives and 'do' to make questions. Signal words: every day, always, usually, never, sometimes, on Mondays. Одоо цагийн энгийн хэлбэр нь өдөр тутмын үйл явдал, дадал зуршлыг тодорхойлдог. I / You / We / They-тай үйл үгийг хэвийн хэлбэрээр ашигладаг. Үгүйсгэлд 'don't', асуултад 'do' ашигладаг. Гол үгс: every day, always, usually, never.
commonMistakes: I wakes up early. → I wake up early.
She don't like it. → She doesn't like it.
Do he work here? → Does he work here?
I am go to school. → I go to school.

page2.readingPassage: My name is Sarnai. I wake up at seven o'clock every morning. First, I drink a glass of water. Then I eat breakfast with my family. I go to school at eight o'clock. I study English, math, and science. In the afternoon, I eat lunch at school. In the evening, I do my homework. I sleep at ten o'clock every night. I love my daily routine!
speakingQuestions: 1. What time do you wake up? / Та хэдэн цагт босдог вэ?
2. What do you eat for breakfast?
3. What time do you go to school or work?
4. What do you do in the evening? / Та оройдоо юу хийдэг вэ?
6. Do you study English every day?

rolePlay.speaker: A
rolePlay.text: What time do you wake up?

rolePlay.speaker: B
rolePlay.text: I wake up at seven o'clock. And you?

rolePlay.speaker: A
rolePlay.text: I wake up at six thirty. Do you eat breakfast?

rolePlay.speaker: B
rolePlay.text: Yes! I eat breakfast every morning.

rolePlay.speaker: B
rolePlay.text: I drink tea and eat bread. Then I go to school.

rolePlay.speaker: A
rolePlay.text: Do you study English every day?

rolePlay.speaker: B
rolePlay.text: Yes! I study English every day. I love it!

page2.speakingTip: Don't worry about mistakes — just keep talking! Every mistake helps you learn faster. Confidence is more important than perfection at this stage.

page3.listeningScript: Bat: Good morning, Sarnai! What time do you wake up? Sarnai: I wake up at seven every day. And you, Bat? Bat: I wake up at six thirty. I eat breakfast at seven. Sarnai: What do you eat for breakfast? Bat: I drink tea and eat bread. Then I go to school at eight. Do you study English at school? Sarnai: Yes! I study English every day. I love it! What time do you sleep? Bat: I sleep at ten o'clock. Goodnight, Sarnai! Sarnai: Goodnight! See you tomorrow.

listeningQuestions.question: What time does Bat wake up?
What does Bat eat for breakfast?
What time does Bat go to school?
What time does Sarnai wake up?
What do they say at the end?

homework: Writing: Write 5 sentences about YOUR daily routine (wake up, eat, go, study, sleep).
Vocabulary: Write the numbers 1-10 three times each in English.
Speaking: Ask someone: 'What time do you wake up?' — remember the answer!
Review: Re-read the listening script aloud before sleeping.
